sentences.translation: Svježe povrće je puno vitamina i minerala.
sentences.translationEn: Fresh vegetables are full of vitamins and minerals.

sentences.arabic: يَجِبُ أَنْ نَأْكُلَ أَلْوَانًا مُتَنَوِّعَةً فِي طَبَقِ السَّلَطَةِ.
sentences.translation: Trebamo jesti razne boje u tanjiru salate.
sentences.translationEn: We should eat a variety of colors in the salad dish.

sentences.arabic: تَنَاوُلُ الطَّعَامِ الصِّحِّيِّ يُقَوِّي جِهَازَ الْمَنَاعَةِ ضِدَّ الْأَمْرَاضِ.
sentences.translation: Konzumiranje zdrave hrane jača imunološki sistem protiv bolesti.
sentences.translationEn: Eating healthy food strengthens the immune system against diseases.

sentences.arabic: الطَّعَامُ الطَّبِيعِيُّ أَفْضَلُ لَنَا مِنَ الْوَجَبَاتِ السَّرِيعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Prirodna hrana je bolja za nas od brze hrane.
sentences.translationEn: Natural food is better for us than fast food.
